basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 25-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Upper age limit relaxed up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/DA candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E/M.Tech in Electrical/ECE/CSE/IT or allied with 60% and GATE, B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/ECE/CSE/IT or allied with 80% and GATE (80 percentile)
qualification.details: Master's degree (M.E/M.Tech) in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engineering/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology or allied discipline with minimum 60% marks and valid GATE score OR B.E/B.Tech with minimum 80% marks and valid GATE score (80 percentile). Final semester candidates may apply provisionally.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + 30% HRA (1st & 2nd Year) Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + 30% HRA (3rd Year)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIEST Shibpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree (M.E/M.Tech) in Electrical Engineering/Electronics and Communication Engineering/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology or allied discipline with minimum 60% marks and valid GATE score OR B.E/B.Tech with minimum 80% marks and valid GATE score (80 percentile). Final semester candidates may apply provisionally.

content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + 30% HRA (1st & 2nd Year) Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + 30% HRA (3rd Year)

rows.event: Result Submission Deadline for Provisional Candidates

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIEST Shibpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIEST Shibpur is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree (M.E/M.Tech) with at least 60% marks and a valid GATE score, or a B.E/B.Tech with at least 80% marks and a valid GATE score (80 percentile) in relevant disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/DA candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position ranges from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 54,600 per month, with specific amounts for the first two years and the third year, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Can final semester students apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, final semester candidates are eligible to apply provisionally for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is EE 1938.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIEST Shibpur located?
faq.answer: IIEST Shibpur is located in Howrah, West Bengal, with the pincode 711103.
